Question:
The figure is divided into two sections: an upper part and a lower part. One of them contains a wiring error. Which of the following statements is correct?
 A. The upper part contains an error
 B. The lower part contains an error
 C. Both the upper and lower parts contain errors
 D. Neither part contains any errors

The diagram is divided into two parts: left and right. One of them contains a wiring error. Which wiring is incorrect?
 A. The left side is incorrect
 B. The right side is incorrect
 C. Both the left and right sides are incorrect
 D. Both the left and right sides are correct
